title: Tatooine (starship)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Tatooine''''' was a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==History==
''Tatooine'' was part of the [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] force under the command of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] dispatched to [[Almania]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]]. The cruiser was destroyed in battle against [[Kueller]]'s fleet.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
